title: Watchtower Scan-Directive Prefix Cache
strategies: trivial: identity / catalog order [0..C-1] (the evaluator baseline order) -> ~0.1
greedy: marginal-frequency ordering (most-frequent clause first, ties by weight then index) -> hoists widely-shared clauses to the front, well above baseline but blind to co-occurrence

strong: seed with frequency order then deterministic hill-climb (adjacent swap + re-insertion) on the exactly-simulated hit rate -> captures co-occurrence structure, beats greedy, stops at a local optimum (headroom remains)
invalid: emits a non-permutation (all zeros) -> rejected as malformed -> 0
